title: ervilia articulata
intro: Ervilia articulata, also known as the "Horse Dung Orchid", is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the genus Ervilia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ervilia articulata include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves to promote overall health and well-being.
